hero.description: I build modern, functional web experiences. Specialized in React, Node.js, and cutting-edge web technologies.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a web developer passionate about creating exceptional digital experiences. With more than {years} years of experience, I focus on modern, scalable, user-centered web applications.
about.bio2: My goal is to turn ideas into digital solutions that make a real impact. I love learning new technologies and tackling complex challenges.

webapps.title: Web Applications
webapps.shortDescription: Powerful web apps for your business: online stores, CRM systems, AI-powered tools, and custom software.
webapps.fullDescription: Custom web applications that grow with your business. From e-commerce platforms to CRM systems, customer portals, and AI-powered chatbots. I build scalable solutions that automate processes, increase sales, and delight your customers.
webapps.whoIsFor: Businesses that need more than a website: online stores, SaaS platforms, internal tools, CRM systems, customer portals, and intelligent automation.
webapps.howItHelps: Automate your processes, sell online, manage your team efficiently, and delight customers with AI-powered features like intelligent chatbots and smart recommendations.
features: E-commerce & online stores with payment gateway integration (PayPal, Stripe, cards)
WhatsApp Business integration for customer communication
Secure authentication, roles & permissions (RBAC) tailored to your business
aiFeatures: Intelligent chatbots for customer support (web & WhatsApp)
WhatsApp Business integration for orders & notifications
benefits: Scale your business with automated processes
Increase sales with AI-powered recommendation engines
Better customer experience with 24/7 AI support
All-in-one solution: store, CRM, and AI in one platform

process.title: Discovery
process.description: Requirements analysis, goals definition, and technical planning

process.title: Design
process.description: UI/UX design, wireframes, and interactive prototypes

process.title: AI Integration
process.description: Implementation of chatbots, automation, and smart features

deliverables: Fully functional web application deployed and running

presencia.title: Digital Presence
presencia.shortDescription: Landing pages, professional portfolios, and institutional websites that capture leads and showcase your work.
presencia.fullDescription: Create a powerful digital presence for your brand. Whether you need a high-converting landing page, a professional portfolio to showcase your work, or a complete institutional website. I help entrepreneurs, freelancers, and small businesses make an impact online.
presencia.whoIsFor: Entrepreneurs needing fast lead capture, independent professionals (architects, photographers, coaches) showcasing their work, and small businesses needing a professional online presence.
presencia.howItHelps: Attract more clients with optimized landing pages, showcase your work beautifully with custom portfolios, and build trust with professional institutional websites.
benefits: Capture more leads with optimized pages
Better Google ranking with SEO optimization

process.title: Consultation
process.description: Understanding your goals, audience, and brand

deliverables: Fully functional website deployed and running

modernizacion.title: Website Modernization
modernizacion.shortDescription: Transform your outdated website into a modern, fast, and high-converting digital asset.
modernizacion.fullDescription: Is your website outdated, slow, or not converting? I specialize in modernizing existing websites. Complete visual redesign, migration to modern technologies, speed optimization, and mobile experience improvements to turn your website into a powerful business asset.
modernizacion.whoIsFor: Businesses with existing websites that are slow, outdated, not mobile-friendly, or not generating the expected results.
modernizacion.howItHelps: Transform your outdated site into a modern, fast, high-converting website that represents your brand properly and generates real business results.
features: Complete visual redesign with conversion focus
Speed optimization and Core Web Vitals improvement
benefits: Higher conversion rates with modern UX

process.title: Audit
process.description: Current site analysis, performance metrics, and SEO audit

process.title: Design
process.description: New visual design and user experience

process.title: Optimization
process.description: Speed, SEO, and Core Web Vitals optimization

seo.title: SEO & Optimization
seo.shortDescription: Improve your search engine visibility and attract more organic traffic to your website.
seo.fullDescription: Get found online with professional SEO services. Keyword research, on-page optimization, technical SEO, and performance tuning to improve your Google ranking and attract more organic traffic. I help small businesses and entrepreneurs increase their online visibility without paid ads.
seo.whoIsFor: Any business with a website that wants to attract more organic traffic, improve Google ranking, and reduce dependence on paid advertising.
seo.howItHelps: Appear on the first page of Google for relevant searches, attract more qualified visitors, and grow your business through organic traffic.
features: On-page SEO optimization (meta tags, headings, structure)
Speed optimization and Core Web Vitals tuning
Google Search Console setup and analysis
benefits: Better Google ranking for relevant keywords
More organic traffic without paid ads
Faster website with better user experience
Higher conversion rates from qualified traffic

process.title: Audit
process.description: Current SEO analysis and keyword research

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: Google Search Console setup and tracking

deliverables: Google Search Console setup and training

automation.title: Business Automation
automation.shortDescription: Automate your processes and reduce manual work with intelligent workflows and chatbots.
automation.fullDescription: Streamline your business operations with automation. Intelligent chatbots (web and WhatsApp), workflow integrations, automated notifications, and lead qualification systems. I help small businesses save time, reduce costs, and improve customer service with smart automation.
automation.whoIsFor: Small businesses and entrepreneurs looking to automate repetitive tasks, improve customer service, and optimize their business processes.
automation.howItHelps: Save hours of manual work every week, respond to customers instantly with AI chatbots, and focus on what really matters: growing your business.
features: Intelligent chatbots for web and WhatsApp Business
Google Sheets, Notion, and Slack integrations
benefits: Save hours of manual work every week
Instant customer responses 24/7 with AI chatbots
Fewer errors compared to manual processes
Better customer experience with faster responses
deliverables: Trained chatbot for web and/or WhatsApp

maintenance.title: Web Maintenance
maintenance.shortDescription: Keep your website secure, updated, and running smoothly with ongoing maintenance.
maintenance.fullDescription: Worry-free website maintenance for small businesses. Security updates, performance monitoring, content updates, and technical support to keep your website running smoothly. I provide ongoing maintenance plans that include everything you need to keep your online presence active and secure.
maintenance.whoIsFor: Small businesses and entrepreneurs who need reliable website maintenance without the hassle of managing it themselves.
maintenance.howItHelps: Keep your website secure, updated, and performing at its best while you focus on your business. No more worrying about updates, backups, or technical issues.
benefits: No more technical worries or stress
Fast response to issues and outages

process.title: Assessment
process.description: Current site audit and maintenance plan
